episode.title: Cariboo Signals - Indigenous Lands & Innovation
episode.description:
Riley and Casey explore technology and society in rural communities. Today's focus: Indigenous Lands & Innovation.

NEWS ROUNDUP: We break down [Techzine Global] VAST Data leverages unique market position to develop full-stack AI infrastructure and [IndigiNews] Indigenous rights defenders say they’ll ‘not stay silent’ after anti-protest bylaw defeated in ‘Winnipeg’, plus 1 more stories, and explore what these developments mean for communities like ours.

RURAL CONNECTIONS: Deep dive on Indigenous Lands & Innovation Topics include: broadband, fiber, satellite, connectivity, data sovereignty.

Hosts: Riley (Tech optimist with an engineering background) and Casey (Community-first skeptic of tech promises).
